title: Asbestos Roof Removal And Replacement
content:
Asbestos Roof Removal And Replacement

Are you looking for an asbestos roofing removal team? Do you think your roof is made of asbestos and needs a replacement? Sandhurst Roofing is the roofing company for you. Call today on 0448 812 800 to discuss your asbestos roof removal and replacement project.

What is asbestos, and why does it need to be removed?

Up until the mid-1980s, Australia had one of the highest rates of asbestos use per person in the world. Asbestos is a natural, highly dangerous, and highly toxic mineral fibre that can cause life-threatening illnesses. As a result, the once popular building material has since been banned, leaving behind many buildings containing dangerous asbestos roofing.

Get a Quote!

Safe Removal of Asbestos Roofs in Melbourne

Asbestos Removal in Melbourne is a highly monitored and regulated industry. Only licensed roofers can remove and replace asbestos roofing. For this reason, our team treats asbestos roof replacement projects very seriously.

Our contractors comply with WorkSafe and the Environmental Protection Authority (EPA) standards for all asbestos roof replacement projects. Furthermore, all Sandhurst Roofing plumbers have a license in asbestos removal.

Get a Quote!

Can You High Pressure Wash An Asbestos Roof?

Never use high-pressure water or compressed air on asbestos products. Be careful when working on asbestos roofs – they are brittle and you can easily fall through.

How to identify asbestos?

The only way to be sure whether a material contains asbestos is to have it tested by a qualified laboratory. The EPA only recommends testing suspect materials if they are damaged, fraying or crumbling or if you're planning renovations that are going to disturb the potential asbestos material.

What is the Australian standard for asbestos removal?

You must always use a licensed asbestos professional to remove friable asbestos and when there is more than 10sqm of non-friable (bonded) asbestos. 

Why Choose Us For Asbestos Roof Removal?

With over 30 years of experience in the industry, Sandhurst Roofing is one of Melbourne’s leading roof specialists. Our team prides itself on providing exceptional workmanship and customer service to all clients, regardless of task.

We understand that an asbestos roof needs to be removed urgently. That’s why we discuss your roofing requirements every step of the way, delivering a quick turnaround at a competitive price while following every safety guideline.

Alongside the safe removal of asbestos roofing, we also have a comprehensive roof replacement service. We can install a new roof for you once we remove the old and toxic asbestos roof sheets.
